title: Modi Targets LDF, UDF In Kerala, Calls Both ‘Corrupt’ Ahead Of Polls
description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Sunday launched a scathing attack on both the LDF and the UDF during a rally in Kerala's Palakkad, alleging that the two alliances have taken turns to plunder the state for decades, the IndiaToday reported."For decades, Kerala has been trapped between the two masks of selfish politics. On one side LDF, on the other UDF; one side Communists, the other Congress. One corrupt, the other mega-corrupt," PM Modi said, making a strong pitch for the BJP-led NDA ahead of th
